title: Instrument d'adhésion

pages.text:
10 JAN. 1986

Republic of the Philippines

MA MINISTRY OF AGRICULTURE AND FOOD

Office of the Minister

Elliptical Road, Diliman, Quezon City

29 November 1985

The Director-General

Office International des Epizooties 12 rue de Prony

F-75017 PARIS

Sir:

I have the privilege to inform you that the Republic of the

Philippines wishes to become a member of the Office International des Epizooties.

The Government of the Republic of the Philippines has studied and examined the provisions of the International Agreement and of the Internal Statutes of 25 January 1924 and agrees to contribute in the running costs of the office under conditions stated, especially with regard to Article III of the International Agreement and Article XI of the Internal Statutes.

As a future member, I would like to insure the full cooperation of the Republic of the Philippines for the upliftment of the goals and objectives of the organization for the end results of an effective animal disease control.

The Philippines would like to be registered in the 6th contri- bution category, which is for 41, 400 French francs.

The official delegate of the Philippines to the OIE will be

Dr. Salvador H. Escudero III, Minister of Agriculture and Food, with

Dr. Josefino Froyalde, Assistant Director of the Bureau of Animal

I remain, sir.

Very truly yours,

Theon I

SAINADOR H. ESCUDERO III

Minister

copies HS.BV.J.G.

Cable: "Minagri" Manila Telephones: 998741; 998946 Telex: (722)-27726 MOA-PH
